The Euphorbiaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies and tribes. Argomuellera danguyana, being a part of this family, shares characteristics with other spurge family members, such as the presence of milky sap and often simple or lobed leaves. The classification of Argomuellera danguyana reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the Euphorbiaceae family.
